seoTitle: Elliott vs Ellis Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Elliott and Ellis Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Elliott vs Ellis Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elliott and Ellis Beach.
heading: Elliott vs Ellis Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elliott, Queensland and Ellis Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ellis Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Elliott (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elliott or Ellis Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elliott has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Ellis Beach scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elliott scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Ellis Beach scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elliott or Ellis Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ellis Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
